name: SHORT EXPIRY-CLEARANCE: Reflex Dog Treats - Chicken Drumstick 80g
description: Reflex natural super premium dog treats can easily be digested due to its high meat content. It will not cause weight gain as it has low calorie. The fatty acids in it support skin and coat health. It is also very effective for training with its high palatability. Ingredients: ?Chicken Breast I,5, Calcium Bone, Vegetable Glycerine, Sorbitol. Nutrient Components Crude Protein 28% Crude Fat 3% Crude Cellulose 0,2% Crude Ash 4% Moisture 23% FEEDING RECOMMENDATIONS: Recommended for all dogs. Feed as a snack or treat between meals. This product does not replace full-dog food daily. Once open, keep the package tightly closed. Store in a cool, dry place.
